Description: Coalesced Mana tier line — custom WCIDs 800000-800002. Based on SQL weenies with blue IconUnderlay 100676435 + black number overlays 1-3 layered on top. Consolidated: trophies + awakening both route through this single range.

Weenies.Notes: Lesser tier. Frost (128) glow. Overlay '1' top-right black (100690976). Awakens gear to +5 max level; also accepted by Collector Vaetha for XP/bank credit.

PropertiesString.Name: Lesser Coalesced Mana
PropertiesString.ShortDesc: Use on eligible equipment to awaken it or raise its maximum item level by +5. Collector Vaetha will also reward experience and pyreals for turning these in.
PropertiesString.LongDesc: A faintly shimmering crystal of condensed mana. Channels into eligible gear to awaken living potential or deepen an awakened item's maximum level by five. Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these crystals to Collector Vaetha in the Town Network.

Weenies.Notes: Greater tier. Acid (256) glow. Overlay '2' top-right black (100690977). Awakens gear to +10 max level; also accepted by Collector Vaetha for XP/bank credit.

PropertiesString.Name: Greater Coalesced Mana
PropertiesString.ShortDesc: Use on eligible equipment to awaken it or raise its maximum item level by +10. Collector Vaetha will also reward experience and pyreals for turning these in.
PropertiesString.LongDesc: A brightly shimmering crystal of condensed mana. Channels into eligible gear to awaken living potential or deepen an awakened item's maximum level by ten. Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these crystals to Collector Vaetha in the Town Network.

Weenies.Notes: Aetheric tier. Magical (1) glow. Overlay '3' top-right black (100690978). Awakens gear to +15 max level; also accepted by Collector Vaetha for XP/bank credit.

PropertiesString.Name: Aetheric Coalesced Mana
PropertiesString.ShortDesc: Use on eligible equipment to awaken it or raise its maximum item level by +15. Collector Vaetha will also reward experience and pyreals for turning these in.
PropertiesString.LongDesc: A brilliantly shimmering crystal of pure condensed mana. Channels into eligible gear to awaken living potential or deepen an awakened item's maximum level by fifteen. Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these crystals to Collector Vaetha in the Town Network.
